content.text:
I'll start by warming up - fetching the latest changes and checking the current state of the repository.

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
```

```bash
git log -3
```

```bash
ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No task files found"
```

The repository is up to date. The git status shows a clean working tree on the main branch. Recent commits show testing work on deep feature interactions and Graph View completion.

There are currently no active task files in the `tasks/` directory - all work appears to have been completed and archived.

I'm ready to assist. What would you like to work on?
